reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [Use of uninitialized variable 'r' when the first node in the adjacency list is the one to be deleted. If p == graph[i].link (i.e., first node), then 'r' was never assigned and using it leads to undefined behavior.]

187.reason: [uses global 'end' which was reset for BFS but not reinitialized for dui1; should use a separate queue index for dui1]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [uses global 'end' which was reset for BFS but not reinitialized for dui1; should use a separate queue index for dui1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.25 , reason:  [uses global 'end' which was reset for dui but not for dui1; should use a separate index for dui1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [using global 'end' which was reset for BFS but not reinitialized for dui1; should use separate queue pointers for dui1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [Global variable 'end' is shared between BFS and BFS1 but not reset properly. BFS1 uses dui1 but increments global 'end', which was used by previous BFS and may have a leftover value even after manual reset. Also, 'start' is global and reused without being reset for dui1. This causes incorrect queue indexing.]
